productDisplayName: ASICS Men Gel DS Sky Speed 2 Running Blue Sports Shoes
description: Once you go under 10 ounces in a running shoe you have to give something up. For most shoes, it is stability. For some shoes, you lose cushioning. The asics GEL-DS Sky Speed 2 manages to retain enough of both to make this a viable everyday shoe from a category usually reserved for race day and speed work. For runners, this is an interesting buy. For long distance triathletes, it’s a secret weapon. asics has it all right with the GEL-DS Sky Speed 2, for it provides enough cushioning and stability to do Ironman distance races, coupled with absolute lightweight comfort.UpperOpen mesh upper for supreme breathabilitySynthetic leather overlays for durable, lightweight support and enhanced shoe structureBiomorphic Fit created with a stretch material that is strategically placed throughout the upper to reduce buckling and provide an exceptional fit and feelAsymmetrical lacing design minimizes likelihood of irritation and heightens comfort and fitDiscrete independently placed eyelets to evenly distribute lace tension for an enhanced fit3M reflective elements allow visibility even in low light conditionsComforDry sockliner offers anti-microbial properties for a drier, healthier environmentMidsoleRearfoot and forefoot Gel cushioning systems work together to better attenuate impacting shock and allow fluidity of the foot throughout the gait cycleSpace Trusstic System midfoot stabilizer creates a pocket between the Trusstic System unit and the midsole, promoting more controlled midsole deformation, as well as more efficient foot functionOutsoleIGS (Impact Guidance System) to enhance the foot's natural gait from heel-strike through toe-offVertical flex groove that decouples the tooling along the line of progression for maximum stride efficiencyAHAR (ASICS High Abrasion Rubber) blown heel plug for excellent durability in this high-wear areaShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in direct sunlight
